alerts: RE-ENGAGEMENT, NOT A COLD CALL: dogonapc.com is OUR OWN demo (Tony built and showed it; the deal went cold). They've already seen a Socialite site once — lead with what's new (real reviews pulled in, their actual photos, the relaunch angle), not the same demo twice.

CLOSED 27 May 2026: owner Janine announced on Facebook that Scran Away will not reopen at Bolton Street with the current pairing; she plans to relaunch independently at a new location. PITCH ANGLE: the relaunch site, ready on day one — confirm her plans before pitching the old address.
Two phone numbers in the wild: 01257 824763 (shopfront sign + demo site) vs +44 1257 576084 (Facebook-sourced directory mirror). Confirm in person.

identity.name: Scran Away
identity.tagline: Good scran. Wicked spot. End of.
identity.story: Scran Away started as a food stall on Chorley market and earned its stripes the hard way — proper breakfasts, butties and pies that turned first-timers into regulars at 73 Bolton Street. A perfect 5.0 on Google and a 5/5 hygiene rating tell you everything: small kitchen, big standards, zero shortcuts.

brand_voice.tone: cheeky, proper Lancashire, zero pretence — talks like a mate, delivers like a pro

palette.rationale: Warm brick red and cream pulled from the shopfront signage and bacon-butty warmth; sage secondary keeps it from shouting. AA contrast on cream.

usps: 5.0 stars on Google — every one of 16 reviews
Made fresh that morning, every morning
Catering platters for offices and events

reviews.quote: I can report the scran was banging
Mythical — spotless AND the best of the best

services.name: Hot Sandwiches & Toasties
services.description: Bacon, sausage, melts — on barms or toast

services.name: Pies
services.description: With chips, gravy and mushy peas

services.name: Cold Sandwiches & Treats
services.description: Made-up fresh, plus cakes and drinks

services.name: Catering Platters
services.description: Breakfast and sandwich platters for meetings and events — call for a quote

site_copy.headline: Chorley's five-star butty shop
site_copy.subheadline: Breakfasts, butties, paninis, jackets and pies on Bolton Street — five stars on Google, 5/5 hygiene, made fresh every morning.
site_copy.about: We started flogging butties on Chorley market and never looked back. No freezer shortcuts, no fancy nonsense — just proper scran made fresh each morning, a brew done right, and a 5/5 hygiene score we're dead proud of. Sixteen Google reviews, sixteen five-stars. That's not luck, that's graft.
site_copy.reviews_heading: Don't take our word for it
site_copy.footer_line: Everything always made with love. End of.
